q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is target.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True), a filesystem write operation that creates directories — an irreversible side effect.

mock_guidance.target: Mock Path.mkdir on the target.parent object, or patch the mkdir call at line 91.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the full resolved path string passed as the implicit self (target.parent) and the keyword arguments parents=True, exist_ok=True.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Record the call arguments without performing any filesystem I/O; return None or a no-op to let execution continue to the JsonResponse return.
notes: The tainted value flows from request.GET.get('ref') through f-string interpolation into the path, so the captured target.parent path will reveal the traversal payload.
Ensure the mock does not resolve symlinks or touch the real filesystem.
